today.title: Today's Training
today.subtitle: Choose a training mode and start practicing structured thinking.
today.emptyBank: The question bank is empty. Please go to the Question Bank to add questions first.

mistakeReview.title: Mistake Review
mistakeReview.desc: Targeted training for historically low-scoring and marked mistakes.
mistakeReview.label: Mistakes to review

weakPoint.title: Weak Point Training
weakPoint.desc: Automatically recommend weak dimensions and framework questions based on practice data.
weakPoint.label: Recommended questions
weakPoint.empty: No weak point data yet. Practice more!

random.title: Random Practice
random.desc: Randomly draw one question from the entire bank.
random.label: Total questions

framework.title: Framework Training
framework.desc: Choose a built-in thinking framework for focused practice.

blind.title: Blind Framework Training
blind.desc: Randomly draw a question without showing the framework. Choose the framework you think fits best before answering.
blind.label: Total questions

sketch.title: Timed Structure Sketch
sketch.desc: Random topic + specified framework + countdown. Force structured output.

today.noQuestionsForFramework: No questions available for the "{{framework}}" framework.

pyramid.name: Pyramid Principle
pyramid.focus: Conclusion first, top-down support, mutual grouping, logical progression

mece.name: MECE Principle
mece.focus: Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive — avoid omission and overlap

5w2h.name: 5W2H
5w2h.focus: Describe and analyze problems from seven dimensions

logicTree.name: Logic Tree
logicTree.focus: Break down problems layer by layer to form a tree-like analysis

bank.title: Question Bank
bank.subtitle: Manage all structured thinking questions.
bank.duplicateIdAlert: Question ID already exists. Please use a different one.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.body: This cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete question {{id}}?

typeInstruction.diagnostic: Identify structural errors in the original text and provide a revised version.
typeInstruction.categorization: Focus on category boundaries, grouping completeness, and naming quality.
typeInstruction.sketch: Complete your answer within the time limit, emphasizing conclusion-first and structural completeness.
typeInstruction.custom: Simulate a real business scenario, paying attention to expression and audience fit.
typeInstruction.default: Complete your answer using a structured thinking framework.

practice.noPrinciples: No related principles yet. You can add them in the Statistics dashboard.

blindSelector.label: Choose the framework you think is most suitable
blindSelector.helper: Without knowing the preset framework, choose the one that best fits this scenario.

practice.outlinePlaceholder: First list the structural skeleton using outline/indentation (conclusion, arguments, categories, etc.)
practice.outlineHelper: Please complete the structural skeleton before writing the full body. Both must be done before submitting.
practice.bodyPlaceholder: Expand into full paragraphs based on the skeleton
practice.timeExpiredAutoSubmit: Time is up. Your answer has been automatically submitted.
practice.timeExpiredPleaseSubmit: Time is up. Please submit as soon as possible.
practice.missingApiKey: Missing DeepSeek API Key. Please go to
practice.parseWarning: AI feedback structured parsing incomplete. Original text has been preserved.

stats.title: Statistics Dashboard
stats.subtitle: Track your structured thinking training progress
stats.empty: No practice records yet. Go start a training session!

principles.title: Principles Library
principles.empty: No principles yet. Click the top-right button to add your first principle.

principleForm.description: Fill in the principle title, content, and tags
principleForm.title: Title
principleForm.contentPlaceholder: Enter the detailed content of the principle...
principleForm.tagsPlaceholder: Comma separated, e.g. communication, report, writing

data.title: Data Management
data.subtitle: Configure API, import/export, and clear local data
data.strictSketchHelper: In strict mode, timed structure sketches will be automatically submitted when time runs out.
data.dropZone: Drag Markdown or ZIP files here to import
data.workDocumentPlaceholder: Paste weekly reports, emails, meeting minutes, etc.
data.clearDataDesc: This will delete all locally stored questions, practice records, and settings. This action cannot be undone.

toast.emptyBankNoExport: Question bank is empty. Nothing to export.
toast.pasteDocumentFirst: Please paste a work document first
toast.questionsGenerated: Questions generated successfully and added to the bank
toast.generationFailed: Generation failed. Please check the document and API settings

knowledge.title: Structured Thinking Handbook
knowledge.subtitle: Connects the core ideas of "Thinking in Systems", "The Pyramid Principle", "Structured Thinking", and "Asking the Right Questions" into an actionable map to help you create order from chaos.

chapters.ch1: Chapter 1 Seeing the Big Picture: Systems Thinking
chapters.ch2: Chapter 2 Organizing Ideas: The Pyramid Principle
chapters.ch4: Chapter 4 Critical Reception: Asking the Right Questions

ai.systemRole: You are a structured thinking coach, specializing in helping users train their application of frameworks such as the Pyramid Principle, MECE, PREP, and SCQA.
ai.requirements: Scores must be objective. The issue list should be specific to sentences or paragraphs. The optimized version must include edit point annotations. Total length should be within 800 words.
ai.autoSubmitNote: Note: The user's answer was automatically submitted due to timeout. Please consider this in your evaluation.

typeInstructions.diagnostic: This is a diagnostic error correction question. Please focus on pointing out structural errors in the original text, explain the reasons, and provide a corrected version.
typeInstructions.categorization: This is a categorization reconstruction question. Please focus on category boundaries, grouping completeness, and naming quality.
typeInstructions.sketch: This is a timed structure sketch question. Please complete your answer within the time limit, emphasizing conclusion-first and structural completeness.
typeInstructions.custom: This is a custom real question. Please simulate a real business scenario, paying attention to expression and audience fit.
typeInstructions.default: Please complete your answer using a structured thinking framework.

userPrompt.autoSubmitStatus: Note: This answer was automatically submitted due to timeout.
userPrompt.evaluationRequest: Please evaluate my answer from a structured thinking perspective.
userPrompt.iteratePrefix: Based on the above feedback, I have revised my answer. Please evaluate again and focus on comparing whether this revision addressed the previously pointed out issues.
userPrompt.genInstruction: Please generate a training question based on the above document. Return only a JSON object.
